kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan who makes Saddles' levy is higher than both the Weaver and the artisan in Kingsford.
14 coins goes with at most one of Rowan, Mason, Loom, Saddles, and Highrow.
Rowan goes with neither Kingsford nor 18 coins.
Mallet goes with at least one of Cooper or Highrow.
Exactly two of (the members of the Joiners' Guild, Matilda, and the artisan with the Loom) belong to the Hill Ward.
Awl goes with exactly three of Edmund, Weaver, Saddles, Kingsford, and 12 coins.
Kingsford goes with 14 coins if and only if Loom does not go with Matilda.
Edmund, Potter, Loom, and Rope belong to different artisans.
Either Potter goes with Rope, or Tapestries goes with 16 coins — but not both.
Between Cooper and Weaver, one goes with Eastcheap and the other with Highrow.
